roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL STATUS OF DEJ & POSSIBLE DISMISSAL/INTC/X DA STATES THAT NO NEW CHARGES HAVE BEEN FILED/TEXT:DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; CRT ORDS DIV TERM ASSUCCESSFUL/X:THE DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THEDEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PROGRAM, THE GUILTY PLEA OF 12-17-20IS HEREBY SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA ENTERED,/MO PC 1385:COMPLETION OF DEJ/SATERM/
